title: Robert Greene REVEALS How The 48 Laws of Power Was Created
summary: Robert Greene discusses the origin story of his book 'The 48 Laws of Power,' describing a fateful meeting with Joost Elfers in Venice, Italy in 1995 where he spontaneously pitched the book idea during a walk. He reflects on the circumstances and timing that led to the book's creation.

events.description: Robert Greene met Joost Elfers in Italy and pitched the idea for The 48 Laws of Power during a walk in Venice

key_claims.claim: Robert Greene was 36 years old and had not achieved much success when he conceived The 48 Laws of Power in 1995
The idea for The 48 Laws of Power came to Greene spontaneously during a walk in Venice with Joost Elfers
Greene believes the book would not have worked out if he had written it at age 25, suggesting his years of struggles were necessary
Greene describes himself as having been slightly suicidal and feeling he had to write a book at that time
